name: S-12 merge --preserve-comments retains operator-supplied comment lines in the merged registry output
command:
printf -- '[]' > catalog.yaml && printf '# operator entry pinned for compliance
- id: custom
  url: https://x.com
' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog catalog.yaml --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml --preserve-comments && grep -q '# operator entry pinned for compliance' merged.yaml && echo preserved 1>&2
